brand_profile.writing_instruction: One idea per sentence. Lead with the outcome. Confident not pushy. Geist typeface. Weight scale: 400/500/600.

features.name: AI Visibility Tracking
features.description: Monitor brand mentions and rankings across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI, Copilot, and more

features.name: Content Optimization
features.description: AI-powered content creation and optimization tools to improve AEO score

features.name: Technical Audits
features.description: Comprehensive site analysis to identify and fix issues affecting AI engine understanding

features.name: Competitive Analysis
features.description: Track share of voice compared to competitors across AI engines

benefits: Increase product discovery through AI shopping assistants
Improve visibility when prospects research solutions via AI
Ensure content is cited and linked by AI engines
pain_points: Spending hours analyzing AI visibility gaps
Lack of actionable insights to improve AI search rankings
messaging_angles: Unlock the full potential of AI search optimization
Take control of your brand's visibility across multiple AI engines

instagram_content.preview_text: Every hour you spend searching for AI visibility gaps is a missed sprint.
instagram_content.body: ["Spending hours analyzing and manually updating your workflows because of outdated insights just isn't working anymore.", "If you're struggling to keep up with the latest AI search trends, it's time to break the cycle.", 'But what if 206% share of voice improvements gave you clarity on how teams can improve their work processes?', 'A clear workflow can reduce operational friction and boost execution speed in just minutes. Introducing Searchable – your secret to seamless team performance.', 'Align workflows across departments with our AI-driven automation tools. evaluation.scores_rationale: The copy clearly states the outcome of using Searchable, but some sentences are a bit wordy and could be broken up for easier reading. The hook is strong and creates curiosity about the problem being solved by Searchable. The tone is mostly confident, but there's a slight pushy tone in some sentences that doesn't quite match the writing instruction. The proof_point appears in the caption body and is accurately stated as 206% share of voice improvements.
